name: @operon-ai/browser
description: Browser host driver for the Operon WASM execution protocol

scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --manifest-path ../../crates/operon-core/Cargo.toml --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir pkg --out-name operon_core ../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/operon_core.wasm
